user.title: Virtual Thermostat
user.description:
Configure a virtual thermostat that controls a real AC based on a temperature sensor.

**Delta AC**: Offset between the user-set target and what is sent to the real AC.
- Positive (+) = cooling boost (e.g., target 25°C, delta +5 → AC set to 30°C)
- Negative (-) = heating boost (e.g., target 25°C, delta -5 → AC set to 20°C)

The virtual thermostat will turn off the real AC when the measured temperature reaches the user's target.

error.climate_not_climate: Selected entity is not a climate entity
